name: Assisted Hanging Knee Raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core muscles and lift your knees towards your chest, bending at the hips and knees.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:4 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Cross-Over Variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Take a step forward, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:5 With a slight bend in your elbows, bring your hands together in front of your chest.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Reverse Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.

Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pull Up (Neutral Grip)
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: EZ Bar Standing French Press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Upright Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Jump Squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Once you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upwards by jumping off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through your toes.
Step:5 Land softly back into the squat position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support.
Step:3 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: Cable Incline Pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Decline Hammer Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Shoulder Press V. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Barbell Lying Triceps Extension Double
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Focus on double movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable High Pulley Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Floor Calf Raise
instructions: Step:1 Place a barbell on the floor in front of you.
Step:2 Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off.
Step:3 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl V. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Bench Seated Press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Biceps Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Incline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Standing Close Grip Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands close together.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Standing Row (V-Bar)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Alternate Lateral Pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hanging Straight Leg Raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Suspended Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a suspension trainer at an appropriate height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Stiff Leg Deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Seated Overhead Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Incline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Hack Squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell behind your legs, resting it on your upper thighs.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: EZ Barbell Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Triceps Dips Floor
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the front of the chair with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:3 Straighten your arms, keeping a little bend in your elbows to keep tension on your triceps and off your elbow joints.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbows to lower your body toward the floor until your elbows are at about a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Once you reach the bottom of the movement, press down into the chair to straighten your elbows, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Seated Preacher Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Dumbbell Incline Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Leg Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Wrist Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Upright Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Concentration Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Cable Seated Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Split Squats
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:3 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Incline Bench Press Seated
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 (seated variation) Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Overhead Press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Incline Push-Up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Front Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Seated Wrist Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Close Grip Curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing One Arm Extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Pin Presses
instructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended.
Step:5 Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:7 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Low Bar Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Alternate Biceps Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Weighted Tricep Dips
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the front of the bench with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:3 Keep your back close to the bench and your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Bent-Over Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: One Leg Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.

name: Smith Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Focus on targeted movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Bent Arm Pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Upright Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Bent Over One Arm Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Cable Wide Grip Rear Pulldown Behind Neck
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: EZ Barbell Decline Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Hip Raise
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:5 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: EZ-Bar Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Front Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Full Squat (Back POV)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Jump your feet back into the squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.

name: Barbell Incline Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever Chest Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Reverse Grip Decline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Seated Overhead Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Straight Arm Pulldown (With Rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Reverse Grip Incline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Drag Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Standing Overhead Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Sumo Squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Step:1 Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Step:5 Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Lying Close-Grip Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Narrow Stance Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Lying Extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Band Hip Lift
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band just above your knees.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Reverse Preacher Curl Inclined
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Perform with inclined intensity.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Speed Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Incline Leg Hip Raise (Leg Straight)
instructions: Step:1 Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Bent Over Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips while keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Seated Shoulder Press (Parallel Grip)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Incline Biceps Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Thruster
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Standing Wide Grip Biceps Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Weighted Straight Bar Dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Standing Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Barbell Upright Row V. 3
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Single Leg Calf Raise (On A Dumbbell)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: Dumbbell Push Press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Seated Row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Low Fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Chin-Ups (Narrow Parallel Grip)
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: EZ Bar Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Single Leg Deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Step:3 Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Barbell Overhead Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Glute Bridge March
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:3 While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable One Arm Incline Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Barbell High Bar Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Decline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Deltoid Rear
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body.
Step:3 Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Alternating Bear Crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 (alternating variation) Continue for the desired distance or time.

name: Cable Reverse One Arm Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Step:2 Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Barbell Incline Close Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Stationary Bike Run
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired.
Step:5 Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture.
Step:6 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop.
Step:8 Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: Barbell Lying Triceps Extension Skull Crusher
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Split Squat V. 2
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Lying Close-Grip Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Weighted Pull-Up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Hammer Curl (With Rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:2 Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Standing Preacher Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Straight Leg Deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Double Push Press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Initiate the movement by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach the top, press them fully overhead, locking out your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position by bending your elbows and bringing them back down to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Hang Clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.

Step:5 As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Suspended Push-Up
instructions: Step:1 Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer.
Step:4 Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles.
Step:5 Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Drag Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:5 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Side Lying Floor Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead.
Step:2 Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg.
Step:3 Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture.
Step:4 Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.

name: Smith Squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever Incline Chest Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Preacher Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
