Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Kettlebell Two Arm Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lying Leg Raise Flat Bench
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Wide Grip Decline Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Press on Exercise Ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:5 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Step:6 Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Step:7 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Rear Delt Row (with Rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Band Bent-Over Hip Extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine.
Step:5 Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Lower your right leg back down and repeat with the left leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Olympic Barbell Triceps Extension
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise Ball Back Extension with Rotation
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:5 Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Push Up on Bosu Ball
instructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Sled 45 Degrees One Leg Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Single Leg Split Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability.
Step:4 Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: Dumbbell Seated Bent Over Alternate Kickback
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Upright Shoulder External Rotation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Triceps Dip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Good Morning
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes.
Step:3 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Weighted Overhead Crunch (on Stability Ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Standing Ab Rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended.
Step:3 Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Lying Rear Delt Row
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Decline Fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Arnold Press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Bench Front Squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Reverse Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Incline Bench Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:4 Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell One Arm Military Press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Barbell Reverse Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Shoulder Tap
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder.
Step:3 Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder.
Step:4 Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Seated Front Raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Seated Neutral Wrist Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

name: Cable One Arm Curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Thruster
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell Rack Pull
instructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hyperextension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Step:3 Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell Seated Shoulder Press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Wide Grip Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Hack Squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell.
Step:6 Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:7 Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:8 Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith Bent Over Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
